text: I thought I'd lost all progress after 2 months off the gym. But every painful rep now reminds me my dreams are worth the sacrifice. Still, it's hard to prioritize when everything else feels overwhelming.
decision_reason: Meets all requirements and is under 280 characters.

text: It's okay to struggle. I see you, trying to get back on track. Every small step towards your dreams, no matter how painful, is a win. My own journey back to the gym after 2 months off has been tough, but it's a reminder that showing up is what matters.
decision_reason: Empathetic tone and use of social proof inverse trigger to resonate with the audience.
